title: My Dear Karadi
desc: Trouble ensues after a bear escapes from the zoo and the zookeeper must find the animal. So, he disguises himself as a bear to save his job.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
desc: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
desc: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Varam
desc: Eby, who hails from a wealthy family, falls in love with Ilina, but her family opposes their relationship. At Eby's insistence, her uncle reveals the shocking reason that could change their future.

title: MLA Mani Patham Classum Gusthiyum
desc: Manikandan is devastated when his sister, Meenakshi, commits suicide after getting raped by Varkey, an evil politician, and sets out to take revenge on him.

title: Bandhukkal Sathrukkal
desc: Two brothers, both moneylenders, hate each other and extend their mutual hatred to their families as well. However, they face several obstacles that intensify after their estrangement.

title: Arante Mulla Kochu Mulla
desc: Two sisters-in-law, Maheswariyamma and Thankamani Kunjamma, compete fiercely to marry off their daughters to the wealthy Omanakuttan, but unexpected twists disrupt their plans.

title: Kazhumaram
desc: Raghavan is a spoilt boy who does not attend school and engages in nefarious activities. After getting caught stealing, he is left with nowhere to go.

title: Aalibabayum Aarara Kallanmarum
desc: Diwakaran, a thief, steals jewellery from Aravindakshan, a school teacher. Jayashankar, a police officer, is appointed to investigate the case who in reality is Diwakaran's brother-in-law.

title: Kalapam
desc: Bharathan, a communist, works for the welfare of the people. He soon faces many challenges when he encounters an evil businessman.
